zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier II De Heilly於1105年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利時，他的父親Thibaud II de Heilly40歲，母親Mabille d'Encre31歲。他於1124年與Gillette de Blois-Champagne在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1146年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier II De Heilly于1105年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利时，他的父亲Thibaud II de Heilly40岁，母亲Mabille d'Encre31岁。他于1124年与Gillette de Blois-Champagne在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1146年在他的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German   Heinle  .

variants.name: Heinle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunther, Konrad, Otto.
South German: from a pet form of the personal name   Heinrich  .

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier II De Heilly was born in 1105, in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Thibaud II de Heilly, was 40 and his mother, Mabille d'Encre, was 31. He married Gillette de Blois-Champagne in 1124, in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1146, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier II De Heilly est né en 1105, à Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Thibaud II de Heilly, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mabille d'Encre, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Gillette de Blois-Champagne en 1124, à Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1146, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier II De Heilly 1105 in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaud II de Heilly 40 und seine Mutter Mabille d'Encre 31. Er hat 1124 in Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Gillette de Blois-Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1146 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier II De Heilly è nato il nel 1105 nel Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaud II de Heilly, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mabille d'Encre, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Gillette de Blois-Champagne nel 1124, nel Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1146, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Miraumont, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメミラウモント
ja.Mære, Borgenfjorden, Steinkjer, Nord-Trø: ノルウェーノード-トルoンデラグステインクジャームaeア

ja.Péronne, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメプeロン
ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier II De Heillyが1105年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリーで生まれた時，父Thibaud II de Heillyは40歳，母Mabille d'Encreは31歳であった。1124年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリーでGillette de Blois-Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1146年に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier II De Heilly(이)가 1105년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 헤이리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaud II de Heilly(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabille d'Encre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1124년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 헤이리에서 Gillette de Blois-Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1146년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier II De Heilly nasceu em 1105, em Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Thibaud II de Heilly, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mabille d'Encre, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Gillette de Blois-Champagne em 1124, em Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1146, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier II De Heilly родился в 1105 г. в местности хилли, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaud II de Heilly было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabille d'Encre, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Gillette de Blois-Champagne в 1124 г. в местности хилли, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1146 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gauthier II De Heilly nació en 1105, en Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Thibaud II de Heilly, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mabille d'Encre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Gillette de Blois-Champagne en 1124, en Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1146, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
